description: Address v2 review feedback: fix CRON_SECRET fail-open when unset, and validate last_taken_date in PATCH handler.
steps: Fix CRON_SECRET in app/api/reminders/check/route.ts to fail closed when env var is unset (return 500)
Add validation for last_taken_date in app/api/medications/[id]/route.ts PATCH handler (must be null or YYYY-MM-DD)
Run npm run build and npm run lint to verify
acceptance_criteria: When CRON_SECRET env var is not set, the reminders/check endpoint returns 500 with error message 'CRON_SECRET not configured'
When CRON_SECRET is set but request has wrong/missing bearer token, endpoint returns 401
PATCH handler rejects last_taken_date values that are not null or a valid YYYY-MM-DD string
PATCH handler accepts last_taken_date when it is null or a valid YYYY-MM-DD string
npm run build succeeds with no errors
verification: eval "$(mise activate bash)" && cd /projects/sandbox/nextjs-medication-reminder && npm run build
eval "$(mise activate bash)" && cd /projects/sandbox/nextjs-medication-reminder && npm run lint
findings: Both v2 review issues fixed. CRON_SECRET now returns 500 when env var is unset (fail-closed). last_taken_date validation accepts only null or YYYY-MM-DD format strings. Build and lint pass cleanly.
